channel.title: diode on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in diode on SoundsBrown

item.title: Isolation
item.description: How do we make sure two interconnected modules don’t adversely affect one another? General Pass I/O connectors through diodes before they connect to the circuit. Use an opamp, see buffers. Digital signals Optocouplers. Dealing with differences in operating voltage Voltage dividers. Regulators.
